commit_scope: Add a live Mac speaker-to-microphone FSK nonce receipt and ratchet public-audio-rendezvous to include the observed audio direction.

commands: coord claim live-audio-copresence-receipt "Next carrier proof after PR #3194: bounded live audio chirp/nonce co-presence receipt with SNR/confidence/latency and raw-audio-retained=0; avoid public API, paste/archive, APK/JNI, BML compiler, and oracle-distillation lanes."
local_validation.notes: The live Mac speaker-to-microphone proof emitted an audible FSK nonce-hash prefix, recorded through the built-in microphone, decoded 12/12 bits, and wrote a derived receipt with nonce_hash_len=64, snr_db=44.75, confidence=99, latency_ms=3390, raw_audio_retained=0, status=pass. A stricter 16-bit attempt observed the live path but blocked at 15/16 bits with snr_db=46.07 and confidence=95, so the first stable floor is 12 bits. Focused Form validation returned 32767 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent; fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY public-audio-rendezvous.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy required for the local Mac acoustic carrier proof; public floor docs and Form receipts are validated locally.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The public-audio-rendezvous floor now has a live acoustic FSK carrier receipt from Mac speaker to built-in microphone with no raw audio retention.
test_flows: Generate a local nonce and SHA-256 nonce hash.
Encode a nonce-hash prefix as audible FSK tones.
Play the FSK tones through MacBook speakers while recording from the built-in microphone.
Decode the captured audio, compute SNR/confidence/latency, write a derived receipt, and delete raw audio files.
Validate the Form receipt direction four-way.

phase_gate.gate: The local acoustic carrier must decode a nonce-hash prefix from speaker to microphone with SNR, confidence, latency, and raw-audio-retained=0.
phase_gate.next: Add Android two-device audio chirp detection or reply path using the same receipt shape.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The public-audio-rendezvous floor had a Form receipt shape plus live public API nonce proof but no live audio capture proof.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: The local Mac acoustic carrier has a live audible-FSK speaker-to-microphone nonce-hash receipt, and public-audio-rendezvous returns 32767 four-way.
new_receipts: live-audio-copresence 20260615T154700Z decoded 12/12 bits, SNR 44.75 dB, confidence 99, latency 3390 ms
